title: A Backward Glance
content:
It is well when you�ve lived in clover,
    To mourn for the days gone by,
    Would I live the same life over
    Could I live again? Not I!
    But, knowing the false from the real,
    I would strive to ascend:
    I would seek out my boyhood�s ideal,
    And follow it to the end.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Henry Lawson, titled "A Backward Glance", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
